data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T17:19 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-037x [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-0z5n: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-krhd: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-nkg0: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-zt1g: Scan agent health ● P2

content.thinking:
All children of the patrol wisp are already closed (✓). This patrol cycle is complete. I need to squash it and start a new one.

Let me check bd mol current to confirm there's no remaining work.

content.text: All steps already closed. Squashing completed patrol and starting fresh cycle.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Patrol complete: all steps previously closed"
input.description: Squash completed patrol wisp to digest

? skogtown-wisp-wisp-uyhs6 [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-4rveu: Scan agent health ● P2
  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-7drr4: Check for orphaned processes ● P2

  ↳ ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-ssr2j: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
